title: Illusionist / 幻术师
description:
A standalone mirror-and-illusion character for Slay the Spire 2, with three coupled systems:

- Mirror: "Copy" summons mirror images that replay your first card each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage.
- Intent: read and reflect enemy telegraphs (Counter, Foresight, Provoke).
- Transmute: temporarily reshape your own cards (Shifting Blade, Myriad Faces, Phantom Blast), with a transmute stack that unwinds one layer per turn.

~40 themed cards, custom relics and potions, a starter relic, and Orobas (Ancient) relic/card upgrades.

Fully localized in English and 简体中文.
changeNote: v0.3.3 - Balance update. Mirror reworked: with X mirror images, only the FIRST card you play each turn is Replayed - but X times (instead of your first X cards each once), concentrating the payoff onto one card. New token Extinguished Lamp (Unplayable, Retain) - the dormant form of the Dim Lamp: Kindle now adds one and relights every Extinguished Lamp in your hand, while Disillusion and Myriad Faces leave them as their cost. Card changes: Obscure and Silver Lining reworked; Conscript now loses Strength/Dexterity only for the turn; Last Stand gains Innate; Catalyze and Aging cost less; Metamorphosis, Fluxweave, Memory and Encore are now Uncommon; Disrupt Copies 1; upgrades reworked on Myriad Faces, Daze and Kindle. Fix: Phantom Venom no longer double-dips on mirror replays. English & 简体中文.
